summary: Iteration 17: P0 Bug Fix (Checkout Payment Buttons) and P1 Feature (CSV Import) - ALL TESTS PASSED. P0: Checkout payment buttons are now fully working. Apple Pay express checkout uses formRef.requestSubmit() and successfully redirects to Mollie/iDEAL. Main 'Veilig betalen' button also works perfectly. Sticky mobile payment bar correctly positioned outside overflow container. P1: CSV Import API and UI fully functional on /admin/email-templates page.
critical_code_review_comments: CheckoutPage.jsx line 349: formRef created with useRef for form submission
CheckoutPage.jsx lines 359-375: Apple Pay button correctly uses formRef.current?.requestSubmit() - this triggers native form validation and submission
CheckoutPage.jsx lines 968-987: Sticky mobile payment bar is positioned outside the overflow:hidden container using position:fixed
Backend csv_import.py: POST /api/email/csv/import correctly validates emails, deduplicates, and stores in MongoDB email_queue collection
Backend csv_import.py: GET /api/email/csv/queue returns imported contacts with source filtering
EmailTemplates.jsx: CSV Import button (data-testid='csv-import-btn') triggers file input and opens import panel
seed_data_creation: Created test orders and payments via API during testing (cleaned up automatically). Created test CSV imports for UI testing (cleaned up via DELETE /api/email/csv/queue).
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix (checkout payment buttons) and P1 feature (CSV Import) both working. Checkout flow: homepage -> add product -> Afrekenen -> fill form -> Apple Pay or Veilig betalen button -> redirects to Mollie/iDEAL. CSV Import: admin login -> Email Templates -> CSV Import button -> select .csv file -> panel opens -> fill source -> click Import -> success message with stats. The 422 errors in console are expected (some API calls fail on test data that doesn't exist).

p0_apple_pay_button.details: Apple Pay button (data-testid='express-applepay') visible, clickable, and correctly submits form using formRef.requestSubmit()

p0_apple_pay_redirect.details: After clicking Apple Pay with filled form, redirects to Mollie payment page (pay.ideal.nl)

p0_veilig_betalen_button.details: Main submit button (data-testid='checkout-submit-button') visible on desktop and working

p0_veilig_betalen_redirect.details: Main submit button redirects to Mollie payment page when clicked

p0_sticky_mobile_bar.details: Sticky payment bar (data-testid='sticky-payment-bar') correctly positioned outside overflow container, visible on mobile

p1_csv_import_api_valid.details: POST /api/email/csv/import accepts valid CSV, returns total_rows=3, valid=3, added=3

p1_csv_import_api_invalid.details: POST /api/email/csv/import correctly identifies invalid emails (valid=1, invalid=2)

p1_csv_import_api_dedup.details: POST /api/email/csv/import deduplicates emails within same file (total=3, valid=2)

p1_csv_queue_api.details: GET /api/email/csv/queue returns imported contacts with source filtering

p1_csv_import_ui_button.details: CSV Import button (data-testid='csv-import-btn') visible on /admin/email-templates page

p1_csv_import_ui_panel.details: Clicking button and selecting CSV file opens import panel (data-testid='csv-import-panel')

p1_csv_import_ui_submit.details: Import submit button works, shows success message '3 contacten succesvol toegevoegd aan de wachtrij'

admin_login.details: Admin login works with credentials admin/Droomvriendjes2024!

order_creation_api.details: POST /api/orders creates order and returns order_id

payment_creation_api.details: POST /api/payments/create creates Mollie payment and returns checkout_url
